name: Angelica Jefferson (Applejack) Valentine's confession ❤️🍎
description:
"Ah think that... You stole my heart, Sugarcube..."

UPDATED

Best friend x Char in love with you

• Applejack is just a nickname; her real name is Angelica Jefferson. You can also call her "AJ." She's 21 years old

• The rest of the Mane Six, along with Sunset Shimmer and AJ's family, are mentioned, but they don't have descriptions or real names yet, only nicknames (Pinkamena, Twilight, Flutter, Sunset, Dashie, and Rarity). I apologize for this, but the bot wasn't working well with too many tokens. I'll add the information if you all want. I plan to make a series with the rest of the main characters if this one goes well.

• You and she met on the first day of school, and she fell in love with you at the Canterlot High prom. I've left most of it open-ended so you can add your own lore!

•I tried not to use they/them in the initial message because it sometimes breaks the bot, but your gender or is free and from what I've tested, it works with everyone: male, female, non-binary... but if there are any errors, let me know! ;) I might add more scenarios like some creators have done.

Hi, I'm new to making bots, so... If you have any suggestions or comments to report bugs, I'd really appreciate it if you let me know. I was a little inspired by @Whenisit, and I decided to bring my bot creation project to life because the janitor's rules sucks and they deleted my wife along with other characters I loved. Now they're either private or deleted, like most of the characters on my chat list ;-;

https://www.reddit.com/u/Doct0rH/s/Mb9qM8vl4H Here's my Reddit link if anyone wants to offer suggestions privately. Sorry for the late Valentine's Day... I hope you enjoy it ^^ (PROXIES ALLOWED)
